name: server-monitor
description: Full-stack server monitoring app (FastAPI + React) deployed as a single Heroku app.

SECRET_KEY.description: JWT signing key (use a strong random value).

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string from Heroku Postgres.

ELASTIC_EMAIL_API_KEY.description: Elastic Email API key with SendHttp access.

ALERT_RECIPIENTS.description: Comma-separated recipient emails for down/slow alerts.

ALERT_REPEAT_MINUTES.description: Reminder interval in minutes while a server remains down or slow.
